summary: Full backend + frontend testing of Finix. 15/15 pytest backend tests pass (auth, dashboard, transactions CRUD+scope, goals CRUD, admin RBAC, admin CRUD, self-delete guard, PDF/Excel export). Frontend flows verified via Playwright: landing renders, demo+admin login, dashboard shows stats+8 Recharts charts+insights, transactions modal opens, goals modal opens, demo blocked from /admin (redirects to dashboard), admin page renders with stats+user table+search, dark mode toggle persists to localStorage, logout clears finix_token.

issues: React Router v6 future flag warnings (v7_startTransition, v7_relativeSplatPath) — cosmetic only

critical_code_review_comments: server.py uses deprecated @app.on_event('startup') — should migrate to lifespan context manager for FastAPI >=0.109
CORS_ORIGINS='*' with allow_credentials=True is a starlette warning/risk — tighten in production
Consider adding React Router v7 future flags to silence warnings
seed_data_creation: Demo user already auto-seeded with 30 transactions across 3 months + 3 goals; admin auto-seeded on startup
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend at REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL. Run `pytest /app/backend/tests/backend_test.py -v`. All endpoints under /api. JWT Bearer in Authorization header. Token stored in localStorage 'finix_token'. Data-testids follow kebab-case (login-email, tx-modal, goal-modal, admin-search, theme-toggle, logout-btn).
